name: Icejade Kosmochlor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヒ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>テイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コスモクロア
desc: If a face-up card is in a Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Icejade Kosmochlor" once per turn this way. While "Icejade Cenote Enion Cradle" is on the field, monsters your opponent controls can only activate their effects the turn they are Summoned. If your "Icejade" monster battles an opponent's monster, that opponent's monster loses 1000 ATK during that damage calculation only.
mnst_eff: If a face-up card is in a Field Zone, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Icejade Kosmochlor" once per turn this way. While "Icejade Cenote Enion Cradle" is on the field, monsters your opponent controls can only activate their effects the turn they are Summoned. If your "Icejade" monster battles an opponent's monster, that opponent's monster loses 1000 ATK during that damage calculation only.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
